jd_text: Build production GenAI applications with Python, FastAPI, RAG, LLM APIs, evaluation workflows, and customer-facing automation. 2+ years experience preferred. Work with product teams to turn AI prototypes into business impact.

Design retrieval augmented generation systems using Python, LangChain, vector databases, embeddings, and cloud deployment. The role emphasizes practical LLM application engineering and measurable enterprise outcomes.
Develop AI agents and automation workflows for SaaS customers. Requirements include Python, APIs, prompt engineering, evaluation, and production support. AWS or cloud experience is a plus.
Create applied AI features for analytics products using Python, machine learning, LLM integrations, and FastAPI services. Partner with sales and customer success to prove business value.
Work with enterprise customers to scope AI use cases, build demos, and connect SaaS workflows to LLM capabilities. Python scripting and strong communication required. Not a commission-only role.
Implement AI platform pilots for customers, translate business problems into technical designs, and support integrations. Experience with SaaS, APIs, automation, and cloud tools preferred.
Partner with account teams on technical demos for a SaaS automation platform with emerging AI features. Requires consultative selling, API knowledge, and customer solution design.
Sell insurance products to consumers. Commission only compensation. Door-to-door prospecting and cold calling required. No AI engineering work.
Support retail store operations, cashier duties, inventory, and customer service. Weekend shifts required. No software engineering responsibilities.
Pick, pack, and move packages in a warehouse environment. Physical labor required. No Python, AI, SaaS, or software development responsibilities.
